{{CargoClone
|name=Pope Goat
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=173
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
